{"code":"
open_prs = github.list_pull_requests(state="open")
total = len(open_prs)
by_repo = {}
for pr in open_prs:
    by_repo[pr["repo"]] = by_repo.get(pr["repo"], 0) + 1
top_repo = max(by_repo, key=by_repo.get)
print("Total open PRs:", total)
print("By repo:", by_repo)
print("Top repo:", top_repo, "->", by_repo[top_repo])
"}
